chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-863 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 23.10.2023 Mian Taj Muhammad Keerio, advocate for applicant. Mr. Imran Ali Abbasi, Assistant Prosecutor General. ----- ADNAN-UL-KARIM MEMON, J: Through this bail application applicant Muhammad Kashif seeks post arrest bail in Crime No.170 of 2023 of PS Sanghar u/s 9(i) 3-C of the CNS Act 1997. 2. Brief facts of the case are that on 10.07.2023 at 0700 hours applicant was arrested by the police of PS Sanghar and from his possession 2020 grams of charas was recovered. Such mashirnama was prepared and thereafter FIR was lodged against him. Applicant filed bail application before the Trial Court which was dismissed vide order 31.07.2023. 3. After arguing at some length, learned counsel for applicant submits that he would be satisfied if the direction to the Trial Court is given to conclude the trial within one month positively and if charge is not framed the same shall be framed on the next date of hearing. Prosecutor present in Court has no objection to the above proposition who states that he will procure the attendance of the Investigating Officer before the Trial Court positively. Bail application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Ali Haider
